ddls:
CREATE TABLE "kingdoms" (
  "kingdom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kingdom */,
  "kingdom_name" TEXT /* Name of the kingdom */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the kingdom's lore and features */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Number of characters in the kingdom */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the kingdom data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kingdom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park */,
  "kingdom_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the kingdom the park belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the park's features and challenges */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Number of characters in the park */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the park data was updated */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the park (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parks_kingdom_id FOREIGN KEY ("kingdom_id") REFERENCES kingdoms ("kingdom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park where the character is located */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character's class */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Total credits earned by the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  "health_points" INTEGER /* Health points of the character */,
  "mana_points" INTEGER /* Mana points of the character */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the character data was updated */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who owns the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the character class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the abilities and lore of the class */,
  "max_level" INTEGER /* Maximum level a character of this class can reach */,
  "base_health_points" INTEGER /* Base health points for the class */,
  "base_mana_points" INTEGER /* Base mana points for the class */,
  "base_experience_per_level" INTEGER /* Base experience points required to level up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the game */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the player logged in */,
  "total_characters" INTEGER /* Total number of characters the player has */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total credits earned by the player across all characters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guilds" (
  "guild_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guild */,
  "guild_name" TEXT /* Name of the guild */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who is the leader of the guild */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the guild was created */,
  "total_members" INTEGER /* Total number of members in the guild */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total credits earned by the guild */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the guild data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guild_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guilds_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_guilds" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "guild_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guild the character belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the character joined the guild */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the character in the guild (e.g., member, officer, leader) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "guild_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "quest_name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quest objectives */,
  "credits_reward" INTEGER /* Credits awarded upon quest completion */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the quest */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated time to complete the quest */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the quest data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_quests" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the quest (e.g., 'pending', 'completed') */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the character started the quest */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the character completed the quest */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the quest status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "quest_id")
)
